en: I could go and read your mind, think about your dumb face all the time
Living in your glass house, I'm outside, looking in her big blue eyes
Did it just to hurt me, make me cry, smiling through it all, yeah that's my life
You're an idiot, now I'm short, now I'm positive
I should go and warn her
Ooh, bet you think that she is so cool
Kicking back on your couch, making eyes from across the room
Wait, I think I've been there too
What'd you do to get you off?
Taking down her hair like, oh my god Taking off your shirt, I did that once
Or twice, uh No, I know I know, fuck off But I think I like her, she's so fun
Wait, I think I hate her, I'm not that evolved I'm sorry, she's missing it
Sad, sad boy, not my business
But I had to warn ya
Ooh, bet you think that she is so cool
Kicking back on your couch, making eyes from across the room
Wait, I think I've been there too
You got me thinking she is so cool
But I know what I know when you're just another dude
That's so true
Made it out alive, but I think I lost it Said that I was fine, I said it from my coffin
Remember how I died when you started walking That's my life, that's my life
I'll put up a fight, take it out my earrings Don't you know the vibe, don't you know the feeling?
If you spend the night, catch me on your ceiling That's your price, that's your price, well
Bet you think that she is so cool
Kicking back on your couch, making eyes from across the room
Wait, I think I've been there too
You got me thinking she is so cool
But I know what I know when you're just another dude
That's so true
Thanks for watching!
